value_metric: a three-lane scheduler (realtime > catchup > backfill) with backpressure that keeps realtime freshness P95 within baseline+20% under every load and auto-pauses the 2016+ backfill when a realtime burst would breach it -- so history backfill can never starve the live front-line data

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: scheduler + backpressure model; not wired to the production cron; the freshness inflation is a structural model to be calibrated against the real Worker baseline when wired
